info.title: SPLAT QR Dashboard API
info.description: Internal and public API surface for QR Dashboard.

ApiKeyAuth.description: API key via Authorization: Bearer sqr_live_<64_hex>

get.description: Returns folders available for the authenticated user.
Returns destinations for a QR code.

post.description: Adds a destination for a QR code.

delete.description: Deletes a destination from a QR code.

get.description: Returns aggregate KPI values for the selected period.
Returns scans timeline, optionally with previous-period comparison.
